2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

30 Anderson Gigo

  • Height 6-5
  • Year Junior
  • Hometown Sao Paulo, Brazil
  • High School Florida Coastal Prep
  • Previous College Langston
  • Position G
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

2024-25 (at Langston University): Averaged 8 points and 3 rebounds per game… Shot 41 percent from three. 

2023-24  (at Northwest Kansas Technical College): Appeared in one game.
